name: Apple Chutney with Sultanas
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds apples, peeled, cored & sliced thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Place vinegar and pickling spice in a saucepan. Bring to a boil for 5 minutes; drain.
2. Combine apples and sultanas in a large saucepan. Add the strained vinegar and bring to a gentle boil.
3. In a cheesecloth square, combine crushed coriander, peppercorns, and dried chilies. Tie securely. Add to the saucepan with brown sugar and salt. Simmer until the mixture thickens. Remove the cheesecloth bag.
4. Pour the mixture into sterilized jars and seal. Makes 3 (1 pound) jars.
